context.description:
This dialog allows you to add a new Azure OpenAI model to GitHub Copilot.
For Azure models, you need to provide: - Model ID: The identifier for your deployed model (e.g., gpt-4, gpt-35-turbo) - Deployment URL: The endpoint URL from your Azure AI deployment - API Key: The access key for your Azure AI resource - Display Name: Optional friendly name for the model
For help with deploying Azure OpenAI models, see the link below.

topic.label: How to deploy Azure OpenAI models
